option.name: originalContent
option.value:
blueprint: name: Automatic Blinds Management (Sun + MQTT Remote) description: > Opens blinds at sunrise and closes them at sunset (optional), with support for an MQTT remote control device using customizable action subtypes (defaults to brightness_move_up / brightness_move_down). domain: automation input: covers: name: Covers / Blinds description: Select the cover entities to control selector: entity: domain: cover multiple: true
# --- Sun-based triggers --- use_sunrise_trigger: name: Open at sunrise description: Automatically open blinds at sunrise default: true selector: boolean: {}
use_sunset_trigger: name: Close at sunset description: Automatically close blinds at sunset default: true selector: boolean: {}
sunrise_offset: name: Sunrise offset description: Offset from sunrise in seconds (negative = before, positive = after) default: 0 selector: number: min: -7200 max: 7200 unit_of_measurement: seconds step: 60
sunset_offset: name: Sunset offset description: Offset from sunset in seconds (negative = before, positive = after) default: 0 selector: number: min: -7200 max: 7200 unit_of_measurement: seconds step: 60
# --- MQTT remote device --- mqtt_remote_device: name: MQTT remote device description: The MQTT device used as a remote control (e.g. Aqara rotary knob) selector: device: integration: mqtt
open_subtype: name: Open action subtype description: The action subtype that triggers opening the blinds default: "brightness_move_up" selector: text: {}
close_subtype: name: Close action subtype description: The action subtype that triggers closing the blinds default: "brightness_move_down" selector: text: {}
triggers: - id: "sunrise" trigger: sun event: sunrise offset: !input sunrise_offset
- id: "sunset" trigger: sun event: sunset offset: !input sunset_offset
- id: "mqtt_open" trigger: device domain: mqtt device_id: !input mqtt_remote_device type: action subtype: !input open_subtype
- id: "mqtt_close" trigger: device domain: mqtt device_id: !input mqtt_remote_device type: action subtype: !input close_subtype
conditions: []
actions: - choose: # OPEN - conditions: - condition: or conditions: - condition: trigger id: "mqtt_open" - condition: and conditions: - condition: trigger id: "sunrise" - "{{ use_sunrise_trigger }}" sequence: - action: cover.open_cover target: entity_id: !input covers
# CLOSE - conditions: - condition: or conditions: - condition: trigger id: "mqtt_close" - condition: and conditions: - condition: trigger id: "sunset" - "{{ use_sunset_trigger }}" sequence: - action: cover.close_cover target: entity_id: !input covers
variables: use_sunrise_trigger: !input use_sunrise_trigger use_sunset_trigger: !input use_sunset_trigger
mode: single

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
blueprint: name: Automatic Blinds Management (Sun + MQTT Remote) description: > Opens blinds at sunrise and closes them at sunset (optional), with support for up to 3 MQTT remote control devices using customizable action subtypes (defaults to brightness_move_up / brightness_move_down). domain: automation input: covers: name: Covers / Blinds description: Select the cover entities to control selector: entity: domain: cover multiple: true
# --- Sun-based triggers --- use_sunrise_trigger: name: Open at sunrise description: Automatically open blinds at sunrise default: true selector: boolean: {}
use_sunset_trigger: name: Close at sunset description: Automatically close blinds at sunset default: true selector: boolean: {}
sunrise_offset: name: Sunrise offset description: Offset from sunrise in seconds (negative = before, positive = after) default: 0 selector: number: min: -7200 max: 7200 unit_of_measurement: seconds step: 60
sunset_offset: name: Sunset offset description: Offset from sunset in seconds (negative = before, positive = after) default: 0 selector: number: min: -7200 max: 7200 unit_of_measurement: seconds step: 60
# --- MQTT remote device 1 --- mqtt_remote_device_1: name: MQTT remote device 1 description: The first MQTT device used as a remote control selector: device: integration: mqtt
open_subtype_1: name: Open action subtype (remote 1) description: The action subtype that triggers opening the blinds (remote 1) default: "brightness_move_up" selector: text: {}
close_subtype_1: name: Close action subtype (remote 1) description: The action subtype that triggers closing the blinds (remote 1) default: "brightness_move_down" selector: text: {}
# --- MQTT remote device 2 (optional) --- mqtt_remote_device_2: name: MQTT remote device 2 (optional) description: A second MQTT device used as a remote control (leave empty if not needed) default: "" selector: device: integration: mqtt
open_subtype_2: name: Open action subtype (remote 2) description: The action subtype that triggers opening the blinds (remote 2) default: "brightness_move_up" selector: text: {}
close_subtype_2: name: Close action subtype (remote 2) description: The action subtype that triggers closing the blinds (remote 2) default: "brightness_move_down" selector: text: {}
# --- MQTT remote device 3 (optional) --- mqtt_remote_device_3: name: MQTT remote device 3 (optional) description: A third MQTT device used as a remote control (leave empty if not needed) default: "" selector: device: integration: mqtt
open_subtype_3: name: Open action subtype (remote 3) description: The action subtype that triggers opening the blinds (remote 3) default: "brightness_move_up" selector: text: {}
close_subtype_3: name: Close action subtype (remote 3) description: The action subtype that triggers closing the blinds (remote 3) default: "brightness_move_down" selector: text: {}
triggers: - id: "sunrise" trigger: sun event: sunrise offset: !input sunrise_offset
- id: "sunset" trigger: sun event: sunset offset: !input sunset_offset
- id: "mqtt_open_1" trigger: device domain: mqtt device_id: !input mqtt_remote_device_1 type: action subtype: !input open_subtype_1
- id: "mqtt_close_1" trigger: device domain: mqtt device_id: !input mqtt_remote_device_1 type: action subtype: !input close_subtype_1
- id: "mqtt_open_2" trigger: device domain: mqtt device_id: !input mqtt_remote_device_2 type: action subtype: !input open_subtype_2
- id: "mqtt_close_2" trigger: device domain: mqtt device_id: !input mqtt_remote_device_2 type: action subtype: !input close_subtype_2
- id: "mqtt_open_3" trigger: device domain: mqtt device_id: !input mqtt_remote_device_3 type: action subtype: !input open_subtype_3
- id: "mqtt_close_3" trigger: device domain: mqtt device_id: !input mqtt_remote_device_3 type: action subtype: !input close_subtype_3
conditions: []
actions: - choose: # OPEN - conditions: - condition: or conditions: - condition: trigger id: "mqtt_open_1" - condition: trigger id: "mqtt_open_2" - condition: trigger id: "mqtt_open_3" - condition: and conditions: - condition: trigger id: "sunrise" - "{{ use_sunrise_trigger }}" sequence: - action: cover.open_cover target: entity_id: !input covers
# CLOSE - conditions: - condition: or conditions: - condition: trigger id: "mqtt_close_1" - condition: trigger id: "mqtt_close_2" - condition: trigger id: "mqtt_close_3" - condition: and conditions: - condition: trigger id: "sunset" - "{{ use_sunset_trigger }}" sequence: - action: cover.close_cover target: entity_id: !input covers
variables: use_sunrise_trigger: !input use_sunrise_trigger use_sunset_trigger: !input use_sunset_trigger
mode: single
